zh.Zweibruecken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germany: 德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes B Mattheis於1674年出生在德國貝也普法爾茲時，他的父親Jurgen Matthias24歲，母親Catharina Gromman24歲。他於1712年10月23日與Anna Margaretha Lossen在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 賀特賀斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1700年在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯茨魏布呂肯享年26歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mattheis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Erwin, Ewald, Friedrich.
German: from a variant of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Johannes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes B Mattheis was born in 1674, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Jurgen Matthias, was 24 and his mother, Catharina Gromman, was 24. He married Anna Margaretha Lossen on 23 October 1712, in Herste, Höxter, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1700, in Zweibrücken, Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes B Mattheis est né en 1674, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Jurgen Matthias, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catharina Gromman, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anna Margaretha Lossen le 23 octobre 1712, à Herste, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1700, à Zweibrücken, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 26 ans.

Oktober 1712 in Herste, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Anna Margaretha Lossen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1700 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Zweibrücken, Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

Lui sposato Anna Margaretha Lossen il 23 ottobre 1712, nel Herste, Kreis Höxter, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Johannes B Mattheis(이)가 1674년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jurgen Matthias(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharina Gromman(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1712년 10월 23일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 ho스터 허스트에서 Anna Margaretha Lossen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1700년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄 즈위브uc켄에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes B Mattheis родился в 1674 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Jurgen Matthias было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catharina Gromman, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margaretha Lossen 23 октября 1712 г. в местности хирст, крис хoкстир, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1700 г. в местности звибрuккен, звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 26 лет.
